claim: The intended architecture is already one hub identity with registry-driven mode routing.
The current advisor projection is hardcoded in Python and TypeScript rather than loaded from the registry.
Recursive graph metadata discovery plus skill_id==folder validation makes discoverable nested packets unsafe for the current ai-council mismatch and breaks one-identity parity.
Existing parity tests require {skill: deep-loop-workflows, mode: ...}, so scaffolding and advisor changes must preserve both fields.
The create command family already uses the right router plus presentation plus YAML asset pattern for /create:parent-skill.
